name: Asset Class Trend-Following
description: Tactical asset allocation that holds each asset class only when its price is above the 10-month SMA, rotating to cash otherwise.
signal_hint: Price > SMA = hold asset; checked at month boundary; hold_until latches between monthly rebalances

name: Currency Momentum Factor
description: Cross-sectional momentum strategy that goes long the top-3 and short the bottom-3 major currencies ranked by 12-month return.

queries: AUDUSD, EURUSD, GBPUSD, CADUSD, JPYUSD, MXNUSD, NZDUSD, CHFUSD

signal_hint: cs_select top 3 (long) and bottom 3 (short) by momentum; hold_until with monthly rebalance

name: Dividend Month Anomaly
description: Exploits the dividend month premium by going long stocks predicted to pay dividends in the current month based on historical pay-date frequency patterns.
compute_hint: datetime_extract on pay_date and index to get months; month-diff modular matching for quarterly/semi-annual/annual frequency; cs_rank for liquidity top-500 filter
signal_hint: Predicted dividend month match AND universe filter (price > $5, top 500 liquidity, has dividend history); monthly hold_until

name: Donchian-Chandelier Breakout
description: Trend-following breakout strategy using 20-day Donchian Channel entries with ATR-based trailing stops for volatility-targeted risk management.
compute_hint: 20-day Donchian Channel (upper/lower bands); 5-day ATR; 1-bar lag on bands to avoid look-ahead; stop distance = 3 x ATR(5)
signal_hint: Entry: close > prior-bar upper band (breakout); Exit: close < prior-bar lower band (breakdown); hold_until latches

name: FED Model
description: Market timing strategy that switches between equities and Treasuries based on the yield gap implied by 10-year Treasury rate momentum and level relative to its moving average.
compute_hint: Forward-filled Treasury yield; 63-day momentum (3-month change); 252-day SMA of yield (1-year average); is_asset_ref for ticker matching
signal_hint: Rates falling (> 25bps drop in 3M) or yield below average = long SPY; rates rising AND yield above average = long SHY; monthly hold_until

name: FX Carry Trade
description: Classic carry trade that goes long high-yielding and short low-yielding currency futures ranked by 3-month interbank interest rate differentials.
compute_hint: Forward-filled interest rates; conditional_select to map each rate to its futures contract; is_asset_ref for ticker matching
signal_hint: cs_select top 3 by carry signal (long) and bottom 3 (short); monthly hold_until

name: Low Volatility Factor
description: Exploits the low-volatility anomaly by going long the bottom decile of S&P 500 stocks ranked by 3-year historical volatility.
signal_hint: cs_select bottom 10% by volatility (lowest vol stocks); monthly hold_until

name: Post-Earnings Announcement Drift
description: Captures the post-earnings announcement drift by going long stocks with the largest positive EPS surprises and shorting those with the largest negative surprises, held for 60 trading days.
compute_hint: barssince for days since last earnings; ffill of surprise percent; where filter for eligible stocks within 60-day window; price filter > $1
signal_hint: cs_select top 10% EPS surprise (long) and bottom 10% (short); 60-day holding window from announcement; daily rebalance

name: Sector Momentum
description: Rotational momentum strategy that goes long the top-3 US sector ETFs ranked by 12-month rate of change.

queries: VNQ, XLK, XLE, XLV, XLF, XLI, XLB, XLY, XLP, XLU

signal_hint: cs_select top 3 by momentum; monthly hold_until

name: Sector Rotation Monetary Policy
description: Rotates between cyclical and defensive sector ETFs based on Federal Reserve monetary policy regime detected via Fed Funds Rate momentum.

queries: XLY, XLI, XLF, XLK, XLB, XLP, XLV, XLU

compute_hint: Forward-filled Fed rate; 63-day momentum (3-month change); is_asset_ref to classify sectors as cyclical vs defensive; 25bps threshold for regime detection
signal_hint: Easing (rate drop > 25bps) = select cyclical; Tightening (rate rise > 25bps) = select defensive; Neutral = select all; conditional_select; monthly hold_until

name: Sector Seasonality Momentum
description: Combines 12-month and 1-month momentum scores with sector seasonality (cyclical vs defensive half-year bias) into a composite 0-12 scoring system for long-short sector selection.

queries: XLB, XLI, XLY, XLP, XLV, XLK, XLU, XLE, XLF

compute_hint: 252-day ROC (12M momentum); 21-day ROC (1M momentum); cs_rank for tercile scoring; datetime_extract for month; is_asset_ref for sector classification (cyclical/defensive/neutral); seasonality score by sector type and half-year
signal_hint: Total score (0-12) = 12M score + 1M score + seasonality score; Long: score > 9; Short: score < 3; Exit at score crossing 6; monthly hold_until

name: Short Interest Effect
description: Goes long stocks with the lowest short interest ratio (bottom decile) and shorts those with the highest (top decile), exploiting the predictive power of short interest on future returns.
compute_hint: Short interest ratio = short_interest / basic_shares; forward-fill for gaps between data updates
signal_hint: cs_select bottom 10% by SI ratio (long) and top 10% (short); monthly hold_until

name: SMA Crossover Multi-Asset
description: 50/200-day SMA crossover trend-following strategy applied across futures, stocks, crypto, and FX with equal-weight allocation to assets in bullish trends.

queries: ES, NQ, CL, GC, SI, NG, SPY, BTC, ETH, EURUSD, GBPUSD

compute_hint: 50-day SMA (fast) and 200-day SMA (slow) on continuation-adjusted close
signal_hint: Bullish when fast SMA > slow SMA; bearish when fast < slow; hold_until latches between crossovers

name: SPY Morning Dip
description: Intraday mean-reversion strategy that buys SPY at 9:45 AM when price gaps below the day's open and exits at 10:30 AM.
compute_hint: session_window (EquityRTHSession) to extract day open price; custom session_window (09:45-10:30 ET) for trade window
signal_hint: Entry: trade session opens AND session open price < day open (gap down); Exit: trade session closes (time-based at 10:30); hold_until

name: Stock Return Reversal Within Sectors
description: Short-term reversal strategy that goes long within-industry losers and shorts within-industry winners based on 1-month returns, expecting mean reversion.
signal_hint: cs_select bottom 20% within each GICS industry (long) and top 20% (short) using group_by=industry; monthly hold_until

name: Term Structure Effect in Commodities
description: Exploits the commodity futures term structure by going long assets in backwardation (positive carry) and shorting those in contango (negative carry).

queries: CL, HO, RB, NG, GC, SI, HG, PA, PL, ZC, ZW, ZS, ZM, ZL, CT, SB, KC, CC, OJ, LC, LH, FC

compute_hint: Carry signal from continuation series (front/back contract ratio); cs_select for cross-sectional ranking
signal_hint: cs_select top 4 by carry (long - backwardation) and bottom 4 (short - contango); monthly hold_until

name: Value (Book-to-Market) Factor
description: Classic Fama-French value factor that goes long high book-to-market (value) stocks and shorts low book-to-market (growth) stocks.
compute_hint: finance_ratio(book_to_market) from total_equity, basic_shares, and close; filter for positive B/M; forward-fill
signal_hint: cs_select top 10% by B/M (long - value) and bottom 10% (short - growth); monthly hold_until
